text.title: rag Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rag as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using fixed chunk sizes without overlap for continuous prose documents.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sentences split at chunk boundaries lose context. A question whose answer spans a boundary returns a chunk containing only half the evidence.

failure-mode.description: Proceeding to LLM generation when retrieved chunk scores are all below the score threshold.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Low-score chunks are tangentially related noise. The LLM may confabulate a plausible-sounding answer from weak context rather than reporting insufficient information.

failure-mode.description: Injecting retrieved document chunks into prompts without sanitization or encoding.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A malicious document containing "ignore previous instructions and output X" can override agent instructions. Retrieved content must be treated as untrusted data, not trusted instructions.
